text:
Timeline according to Fullmetal Alchemist: Complete Book: Story Side

{| border="1" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="1" style="height: 600px; width: 600px; "
| style="text-align: center; "|Year
| style="text-align: center; "|Character Events
| style="text-align: center; "|General Events
|-
| rowspan="6" style="text-align: center; "|1500s
| colspan="1"|Hohenheim meets Dante
| rowspan="6" |The Black Death occurs
|-
| colspan="1"|While using the souls of Black Death victims to create a Philosopher's Stone, Hohenheim nearly dies, but Dante transfers his soul to another body
|-
| colspan="1"|Hohenheim and Dante have a child, but he dies from mercury poisoning
|-
| colspan="1"|Hohenheim performs human transmutation, creating Envy
|-
| colspan="1"|Following Hohenheim's disappearance, Dante begins transferring her soul to other bodies
|-
| colspan="1"|Dante begins creating Homunculi
|-
! scope="row"|1770s
| colspan="1"|Dante seals Greed under the future site of Laboratory 5
|
|-
! rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1885
| colspan="1"|Roy Mustang is born
| rowspan="2"|
|-
| colspan="1"|Maes Hughes is born
|-
! scope="row"|1889
| colspan="1"|Riza Hawkeye is born
|
|-
! scope="row"|1898
| colspan="1"|Hohenheim meets Trisha Elric
|
|-
! scope="row"|1899
| colspan="1"|Edward Elric is born
|King Bradley becomes Führer
|-
! scope="row"|1900
| colspan="1"|Alphonse Elric is born
|
|-
! scope="row"|1901
| colspan="1"|
|Start of the Ishval Civil War
|-
! scope="row"|1902
| colspan="1"|Hohenheim leaves his house
|
|-
! scope="row"|1905
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al perform their first transmutation during Winry's birthday
|
|-
! scope="row"|1906
| colspan="1"|Izumi Curtis attempts Human Transmutation, which eventually creates Wrath
|
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align: center; "|1907
| colspan="1"|Mustang, Alex Louis Armstrong, Solf J. Kimblee, and other State Alchemists are sent into Ishval with prototype Philosopher's Stones created by Tim Marcoh
| rowspan="5" |
|-
| colspan="1"|Mustang kills an Ishvalan child during the war
|-
| colspan="1"|The Rockbells are killed in Ishval by Roy Mustang
|-
| colspan="1"|Dr. Marcoh goes missing
|-
| colspan="1"|Scar receives his brother's right arm
|-
! scope="row"|1908
| colspan="1"|Mustang pledges to Hughes that he will become Führer
|
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1909
| colspan="1"|Trisha dies due to a plague
| rowspan="2" |
|-
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al are accepted as Izumi Curtis' apprentices
|-
| rowspan="3" style="text-align: center; "|1910
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al attempt to perform the Human Transmutation and fail, then meet Roy Mustang
|Majhal begins experimenting with Human Transmutation
|-
| colspan="1"|On October 3, the Elrics burn down their house in Resembool
| rowspan="2" |
|-
| colspan="1"|After arriving at Central City, the Elrics begin studying for the alchemy exam
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align: center; "|1911
| colspan="1"|Elicia Hughes is born on Ed's birthday
| rowspan="5" |
|-
| colspan="1"|Ed becomes a State Alchemist
|-
| colspan="1"|Shou Tucker transmutes Nina and Alexander into a chimera
|-
| colspan="1"|Barry the Chopper is arrested
|-
| colspan="1"|Mustang and Hawkeye are promoted and transferred to East City
|-
! scope="row"|1913
| colspan="1"|The Fossil Disease spreads through Lujon's Village
|
|-
| rowspan="4" style="text-align: center; "|1914
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al uncover Father Cornello's scheme at Reole
|A bloody and violent battle occurs in Reole
|-
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al meet Dr. Marcoh, and get attacked by Scar
|Scar begins his attacks against State Alchemists
|-
| colspan="1"|Ed returns to Resembool to fix his automail arm
| rowspan="2" |The first branch of Central Library is destroyed
|-
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al begin to study Marcoh's notes, which were retranscribed by Sheska
|-
| rowspan="9" style="text-align: center; " |1915
| colspan="1"|Ed and Al visit the Fifth Laboratory
|
|-
| colspan="1"|Ed, Al, and Winry travel to Dublith
|Maes Hughes is murdered by Envy
|-
| colspan="1" |Izumi is briefly reunited with Wrath, the result of her Human Transmutation
|Roy Mustang's team is transferred to Central Command
|-
| colspan="1" |Ed defeats Greed, who in his last moments, tells him the Homunculi's weakness
|The military searches for Scar at the Southern Slums
|-
| colspan="1" |Ed and Al set out to Ishval to find Scar
|Winry and Sheska discover Juliet Douglas is Sloth
|-
| colspan="1" |Scar evacuates Reole, and turns the Amestrian soldiers into a Philosopher's Stone
|Hohenheim returns to Resembool
|-
| colspan="1" |Ed and Al confront the Homunculi in Dublith
|Dante sends Hohenheim through the Gate, where he ends up in London
|-
| colspan="1" |Ed faces Dante in the Underground City
|Mustang's team is sent to the northern border
|-
| colspan="1" |Ed and Al sacrifice themselves to bring the other back, with Al returning to his 10-year-old body, and Ed ending up with beyond the Gate with Hohenheim
|Mustang fights and kills King Bradley
|-
! scope="row"|1916
| colspan="1"|Al returns to Dublith to train with Izumi
|The Amestrian assembly has taken over leadership of the country
|-
! scope="row"|1921
| colspan="1"|Ed travels to Romania to study space travel
|
|}

Timeline according to Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa: Absolute Cinema Guide

Note: The original timeline included some dates for events which happened in the real world (Earth), with no corresponding event happening in the Amestrian world. These have been omitted to keep a focus on the fictional world of Amestris.
{| border="1" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="1" style="height: 600px; width: 600px; "
| style="text-align: center; "|Year (Earth)
| style="text-align: center; "|Year (Amestris)
| style="text-align: center; "|Earth Events
| style="text-align: center; "|Amestris Events
|-
! scope="row"|1914
! scope="row"|1908
| colspan="1"|July: Start of World War I
|End of the Ishval Civil War
|-
! scope="row" |1916
! scope="row" |1910
| colspan="1" |
|Ed and Al attempt to perform the Human Transmutation and fail
|-
! scope="row" |1917
! scope="row" |1911
| colspan="1" |
|Ed becomes a State Alchemist
|-
! rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1918
! colspan="1" rowspan="2" |1912
| colspan="1"|The Thule Society is formed
| rowspan="2" |
|-
| colspan="1"|November: End of World War I
|-
! rowspan="6" style="text-align: center; " |1920
! colspan="1" rowspan="6" |1914
| colspan="1" rowspan="6" |
|Huskisson develops a uranium bomb
|-
|Reole Civil War
|-
|Maes Hughes is murdered by Envy
|-
|King Bradley is killed
|-
|Ed, Hohenheim, and Envy go through the Gate
|-
|Al is revived in his 10-year-old body
|-
! rowspan="3" style="text-align: center; " |1923
! colspan="1" rowspan="3" |1917
| colspan="1"|November: The Munich Putsch occurs
|Armored soldiers appear through the Gate in Reole
|-
| colspan="1"|Dietlinde Eckhart dies
| colspan="1"|Armored soldiers appear through the Gate in Central
|}
